title: Fluffy Zestwrap
description: A spicy, fluffy, energizing Greek dish featuring all-purpose seasoning, steam, and vegetarian-friendly.

ingredients.name: Vegetables for Grilling (optional)
ingredients.notes: Such as bell peppers, onions, mushrooms

instructions: In a small bowl, mix All-Purpose Seasoning, Vegetable Oil, minced Garlic, Fresh Zest of Lemon, Oregano, and Red Pepper Flakes. Set aside.
Prepare vegetables for grilling if desired. Brush with oil and season lightly with salt and pepper.
Arrange seasoned vegetables on a baking sheet. Drizzle remaining dressing over them and mix to coat evenly.
Grill vegetables until tender, about 10-12 minutes (if using).
Divide grilled vegetables between serving plates. Sprinkle additional seasoning mix on top of each portion if desired.
